name: Iter18 — Comparison detail page shows full content at /comparisons/:id
description: When a user navigates to a saved comparison detail page via /comparisons/:id, the page renders the Score Comparison Banner, Diff Summary table, and two side-by-side review reports with their scores and verdicts.

planSteps.description: Verify at least one saved comparison row is visible in the table
Click the View button on the first comparison row
Verify the Score Comparison Banner is visible showing two numeric scores and a delta indicator
Verify the Diff Summary table is visible with category rows showing score changes
Verify two side-by-side review report panels are visible, one labeled Old PR and one labeled New PR, each showing a score and verdict
Verify the Copy Share Link button is visible and clickable
